calendar.matters:
Petition To Instruct Trustee
Off Calendar Dec-12-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alicia Gamez for MUFG Union Bank (Trustee). Sarah King for Page Anderson (Beneficiary).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the issue of whether distribution of income at this time is discretionary or mandatory in nature, ambiguity regarding language on page two of the Trust document and the Trustors' intent. The petition for instructions was taken under submission.

Judge: Paul H.Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Petition To Instruct Trustee
Off Calendar Nov-10-2014 Continued To Dec-08-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
